title: Edge CV Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on YOLO and model optimization.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of 'Quantization' when preparing a Computer Vision model for an Edge device like a smartphone?
options: To add more layers to the model
To reduce the model's memory footprint and increase its execution speed by using lower-precision math
To make the model more accurate by adding more training data
To allow the model to access the internet
